text:
data 
source. 

SHORT NAME: BENE_ID 

LONG NAME: BENE_ID 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 15 

FILE(S): All demographic and eligibility 

SOURCE: CCW (derived) 

VALUES: 15-character alphanumeric string (Ex. 22222222GDDGjJs) 
NULL = not enough identifying information to assign a BENE_ID 

COMMENT: If the BENE_ID is null/missing, then use the combination of MSIS_ID and STATE_CD to identify distinct 
enrollees. Note that if using multiple years of data, MSIS_ID and STATE_CD may not represent the 
same
